_comment: Quality-guardrail ratchet baseline. Metrics may only DECREASE without review; an INCREASE fails CI (see ci/check_quality_guardrails.py). #721 (startup.rs extraction) then merged, removing ~227 lines from the bin — bin line ceiling tightened 4186→3959 to lock that gain, and the new SG-008 startup.rs is now tracked (line ceiling + panic_budget 0, keeping the fail-closed predicate panic-free) and added to ownership_scope. WS-0.5 (/metrics, PR #774, reviewed+merged) grew three tracked files with observability code and its tests: the bin gained the LockedOut scrape DoD test (3997→4087 lines; panic budget 117→121 — the four new expect/unwraps are all in that test), verifier.rs gained the AppState fleet_metrics field (1092→1099), policy_layer.rs gained the denial classifier + counting + two test modules (1036→1154). Ceilings re-pinned at exactly those values — the next growth still fails. When a refactor legitimately raises a ceiling, bump it with a justification in the PR; when it lowers one, tighten it here.
